Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
import re

files = [
    '/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Applications.jsx',
    '/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/CreditAssessments.jsx',
    '/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Approvals.jsx',
    '/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Disbursements.jsx',
    '/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Collaterals.jsx',
    '/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/lms/ActiveLoans.jsx',
]

# Pattern: match the actions column block
pattern = re.compile\(
    r",?\\s*\\{\\s*title:\\s*'',\\s*key:\\s*'actions',.*?fixed:\\s*'right',\\s*render:.*?\\},\\s*\\},",
    re.DOTALL
\)

for path in files:
    with open\(path, 'r'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    new_content = pattern.sub\('', content\)
    if new_content != content:
        with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
            f.write\(new_content\)
        print\(f'Cleaned: {path.split\("/"\)[-1]}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'No match: {path.split\("/"\)[-1]}'\)
EOF)

Bash(BLOCK='    {
      title: '"'"''"'"',
      key: '"'"'actions'"'"',
      width: 60,
      fixed: '"'"'right'"'"',
      render: \(_, row\) => \(
        <Tooltip title="View Loan">
          <Button type="text" size="small" icon={<EyeOutlined />}
            onClick={\(e\) => { e.stopPropagation\(\); navigate'"'"'/los/applications/'"'"' + row.loanNumber\) }} />
        </Tooltip>
      \),
    },'

for file in \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/CreditAssessments.jsx \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Approvals.jsx \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Disbursements.jsx \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Collaterals.jsx \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/lms/ActiveLoans.jsx; do
  python3 -c "
import re, sys
path = '$file'
with open\(path\) as f: content = f.read\(\)
pattern = r\\"    \\{\\\\s*title: '',\\\\s*key: 'actions',\\\\s*width: 60,\\\\s*fixed: 'right',\\\\s*render:.*?\\},\\\\s*\\"
new = re.sub\(pattern, '', content, flags=re.DOTALL\)
with open\(path, 'w'\) as f: f.write\(new\)
print\('Done:', path.split\('/'\)[-1]\)
"
done)

Bash(for file in \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/Applications.jsx \\
  /Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform-ui/src/pages/los/CreditAssessments.jsx \\

  python3 -c "
path = '$file'
with open\(path\) as f: content = f.read\(\)
# Remove EyeOutlined and Tooltip from imports if no longer used
import re
# Remove EyeOutlined from icon imports
content = re.sub\(r',\\s*EyeOutlined', '', content\)
content = re.sub\(r'EyeOutlined,\\s*', '', content\)
# Remove Tooltip from antd imports if not used elsewhere
if 'Tooltip' not in content.split\('import'\)[2] if len\(content.split\('import'\)\) > 2 else '':
    content = re.sub\(r',\\s*Tooltip', '', content\)
    content = re.sub\(r'Tooltip,\\s*', '', content\)
with open\(path, 'w'\) as f: f.write\(content\)
print\('Cleaned imports:', path.split\('/'\)[-1]\)
"
done)

Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('/Users/manu/Documents/pennant/lending-platform/src/main/java/com/moneymoment/lending/services/LoanService.java', 'r'\) as f:

end = 329    # closing } of closeLoan + blank line

    f.writelines\(new_lines\)
print\('Done. Lines removed:', end - start\)
")
